thirdParty.description: Third-party ad or analytics areas that may render dynamically.

dynamicBanner.description: Dynamic promotional banners or rotating content.

dynamicImage.description: Images that may be lazy loaded or change per environment.

dynamicArticleDate.description: Article dates that may change in listing.

adArea.description: Ad blocks that should not affect layout comparison.

dynamicRankingUpdate.description: Dynamic ranking updates, dates, or standings updates.
